observed_evidence: Finding: direct AgentAdapterRequest construction with tool_policy_refs=(tool-policy:reviewer-readonly, tool-policy:unknown) still enters read tier. Repro command returned True/read-only/True for agent_request_read_tier, codex sandbox, and read-only prompt rule presence. Evidence: support/connection/agent_adapter.py:525 defines read tier, and lines 536-540 only require non-write plus intersection with READ_ONLY_TOOL_POLICY_REFS plus codex/claude adapter; AgentAdapterRequest __post_init__ at support/connection/agent_adapter.py:281-330 does not validate tool_policy_refs.

Normal run path is narrower than the direct helper gap: run builds request tool_policy_refs from prepared.agent_object.tool_policy_refs at support/operator/run.py:1877-1920, and file-backed Agent Objects pass through validate_agent_refs at support/operator/run.py:1681-1721; unknown Agent resource refs resolve through agent/tool_policies paths at support/connection/agent_resources.py:333-370.

No catastrophic read-tier write leak observed in inspected code. Read-tier prompt rules explicitly allow read/search/diff/checker commands and forbid edit/create/delete/write plus git mutations at support/connection/agent_adapter.py:1138-1149; Claude read tier returns plan mode with Read,Grep,Glob only at support/connection/agent_adapter.py:1041-1046.

Write tier behavior smoke held: direct effective-write probe returned True/workspace-write only with write_scope + tool-policy:read-write-scoped; dev no-write request returned False read-tier and read-only sandbox. Code gate is support/connection/agent_adapter.py:513-522.

Gemini stays none in the read-tier decision because agent_request_read_tier only admits codex-local and claude-local at support/connection/agent_adapter.py:540; prompt documents gemini none-tier at support/connection/agent_adapter.py:1153-1162.

Artifact-grounding propagates to gates: support/operator/run.py:1545-1574 and support/operator/gate_sequence.py:80-83,250-255 append .repository_artifact_ref fields into gate base required fields.
